name: Delete Project API
summary: Backend API endpoint for deleting a project and cleaning up associated resources
goals: Safely remove project records and associated data
Provide options for keeping or removing project files on disk

specDetail.description: Exposes DELETE /api/projects/:id endpoint that removes a project record from the database. Optionally removes project files from disk based on the removeFiles parameter.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Project ID to delete (required, path parameter)

parameters.name: removeFiles
parameters.description: Whether to delete project files from disk (default false)

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Skip safety checks for active sessions (default false, admin only)

constraints: Must return 404 if project does not exist
Must refuse deletion if project has active agent sessions
Must clean up all associated database records (specs, sessions, metadata)

acceptanceCriteria.given: a project exists with no active sessions
acceptanceCriteria.then: the project and all associated data are removed and status 204 is returned

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
